svg.text: ULX3S GPIO headers J1/J2 -- KGPE-D16 assignment

Full 2x20 headers in board row order (from the ULX3S PCB): gp/gn pairs plus the power/GND pins. J1 = idx 0-13, J2 = idx 14-27, drawn 27 (top) -> 14 (bottom) as on the board. idx 11-13 shared with the on-board ESP32 (excluded from the usable pool).
idx 14-17 double as onboard ADC AIN0-7 -- assigned anyway (ADC unused by this design). J1 supply = 2V5_3V3; J2 supply = +5V (via STPS2L40AF) and +3V3. FPGA ball in parens.
